# TinyHomeInsurance.co.nz

> Specialist insurance for tiny homes, tiny houses on wheels (THOWs), container homes, and off-grid dwellings across New Zealand.

TinyHomeInsurance.co.nz is a New Zealand insurance referral service. We connect tiny home owners with NZ-licensed insurance advisers who specialise in non-standard dwellings. Our advisers have access to the broking market and can arrange specialist cover for all types of tiny homes.

## What We Cover

- Tiny houses on wheels (THOW) — building, transit, and liability
- Fixed-foundation tiny homes — building and contents
- Container homes — structure and contents
- Off-grid dwellings and cabins — including solar, battery, and rainwater systems
- Park homes and relocatable homes
- Tiny home rental and Airbnb cover
- Public liability for tiny home owners

## Key Pages

- /coverage/ — All coverage types with detailed descriptions
- /coverage/building-structure/ — Building and structure insurance for tiny homes
- /coverage/contents-insurance/ — Contents insurance for tiny home residents
- /coverage/transit-towing-cover/ — Transit cover for THOWs
- /coverage/public-liability/ — Public liability insurance
- /coverage/off-grid-systems/ — Cover for solar, battery and off-grid infrastructure
- /coverage/loss-of-use/ — Alternative accommodation cover
- /coverage/landlord-insurance/ — Landlord cover for rental tiny homes
- /faq/ — Frequently asked questions about tiny home insurance in NZ
- /blog/ — Guides and articles on tiny home insurance
- /contact/ — Quote request form
- /about/ — About the service and financial advice disclosure

## About This Service

TinyHomeInsurance.co.nz is a lead generation and referral service, not an insurer or licensed financial adviser. Advisers referred through this service are NZ-licensed under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013. The service is free to consumers; advisers earn commission from insurers.

Contact: hello@cover4you.co.nz
